name: Tannehill State Park
content: I was driving from Pell City to Tuscaloosa at some ungodly hour of the night with work the next morning, when I realized two things: the first was that the stars were out and would be really pretty if I could get off the interstate. The second was that I really needed to pee. I turned off the interstate and wandered around into Tannehill, where I got a good look at the stars and was able to take care of the other business in the woods. Apparently this area was a Confederate iron and steelworks during the civil war? It was kinda scary to realize that while I was driving/peeing (not at the same time) in the woods alone at night.
